name: io.github.rekordcloud/sonovault
description: Music metadata for AI assistants: ISRC and ISWC lookup, track search, and cross-platform ID resolution across Spotify, Apple Music, Tidal, Beatport, Discogs, MusicBrainz, and YouTube for 90M+ tracks.

environmentVariables.name: SONOVAULT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: SonoVault API key. Free tier (1,000 requests/month) at https://sonovault.now
